equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 10% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.

equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the 35% of Chain Lightning damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 5% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link two additional times.

equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.

equipmentMods.goblet: Carnage of Fire: Now spawns on enemies. When the fire hits the ground, spawn a flaming spike that gains a 25% damage bonus.
